title: 200pcs Hot Pink Silk Rose Petals Mother’S Day Wedding Confetti Anniversary Table Decorations Christening Flowers Scatter
features: Great for decorating at weddings, engagement parties and creating a romantic atmosphere. Unscented for those with allergies. Durable & doesn't easily rip. Beautiful natural looking artificial silk petals.
These Hot Pink rose petals are made from polyester silk

Lightweight, Nice as a replacement of confetti at weddings or celebrations. Each petal is made an identical. This Artificial flower with high simulation looks like real flowers, it can easily reach the purpose of creating the romantic atmosphere.
Shaped and looked like the real rose, pretty, delicate, feels lovely and looks amazing.
description: From the manufacturer Silk Rose Petals Usage: Decoration for wedding, anniversary, valentine day This petals can be used to spell name of your special one Decorate your living room, bedroom, garden, service table with this silk rose petals Other Details: Non-toxic material Lightweight Fragrance free Reusable Eye-catching bright and colorful SHATCHI Silk Rose Petals The rose petals are made of soft lightweight fabric, non-toxic petals, which can be reused.
